data.name: One Potion Please
data.detailed_description:
NSFW expansion themed potion crafting puzzle game!

Comedy! Transformations! Boobs! (No explicit sex scenes, only partial nudity)

After selling health potions to dungeon-delving adventurers, the dungeon’s dark overlord is none-too-happy with you. Now she is forcing you to sell sabotaged potions, custom brewed with for each adventurer to hinder them with kinky bodily transformations.

Remember, warriors get the breast expansion potion, UNLESS they intend to fight eyeball-demons (who are easily distracted, but can you blame them?), but don’t bother if you’ve already given them the blueberry potion, which swells them up so big that they roll over and squish the adventurers preceding them.

If the adventurers are too bold, stupid, or horny to be dissuaded, you might be able to use some cursed artifacts to deal with them. The Skimpy Bra of Invincibility probably won’t help you, but the Bimbonomicon might. If all else fails, the local monsters might have some ways to help.

 

One Potion Please is a lighthearted, comedic, potion crafting point-and-click-adventure game revolving around kink elements. Includes:
-Breast Expansion,
-Ass Expansion, 
-Thigh Expansion, 
-Belly Expansion,
-Lip Expansion,
-Lactation,
-Bimbofication,
-Shortstackification,
-and other kinky transformations! 

-Fantastic artwork by DrWahee!

-Hyper sizes!

-Linear story.

-No explicit sex scenes.

-No visible genitalia. Partial nudity.

-Includes a character creator

-Includes an endless mode

Try the Free DEMO now! Includes:
-The first 21 days of the Story Mode!

-A partial build of the Sandbox Mode

-A partial build of the Endless Mode

data.short_description: NSFW expansion themed potion crafting puzzle game! Mix kink-themed potions to inflate boobs, bwomph butts, and more, in this comedic and lewd fantasy world.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1Gb Video Memory
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 顯示卡: 1Gb Video Memory
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
